violations.description: Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food * was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. - Hot hold breakfast sandwich unit was out of water and temperature was 109*F and product temp was 139*F. Employee addressed issue and corrected on the spot.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
